story-img-2c4e8a.query: Our Story Made by hand. Worn for years. "We started Velmora in a Brooklyn apartment, casting the first pieces in a single borrowed mold. Five years later, the same intention — quiet, made-to-last, made to be loved." atelier jewelry maker hand finishing editorial warm
